pnpm.//: sqlite3 is a native dep of @cursor/sdk and MUST compile its binding, or every SDK import throws 'Could not locate the bindings file' on Vercel's clean install (the planner + agent-spawn then silently fall back). An explicit allowlist guarantees the build across pnpm 9/10/11; esbuild is omitted on purpose since it ships prebuilt platform packages and needs no build script.
